title: Tangy Irish Chilli Wrap
description: A spicy, comforting, and tender wrap inspired by Irish cuisine, featuring sweet chilli sauce and tender beef. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a large pan over medium-high heat and cook the ground beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the pan and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the sweet chilli sauce and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the ssam-style pork belly to the pan and stir to combine.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Warm the ssam wraps according to package instructions.
Spoon the beef and pork mixture onto the centre of each wrap, followed by a sprinkle of Irish cheddar cheese.
Top each wrap with a dollop of Irish butter and a sprinkle of fresh cilantro.
Garnish with additional fresh cilantro if desired.
